narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township H (precinct in Lucas County) has 941 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
